meanings.definition: cause to feel resentment or indignation
act in disregard of laws, rules, contracts, or promises
examples: violate the basic laws or human civilization
The scandalous behavior of this married woman shocked her friends
She hurt me when she did not include me among her guests
This remark really bruised my ego

meanings.definition: offending against or breaking a law or rule
examples: contracts offending against the statute were canceled
